title: churning / twisting
point: churning=刷佣频繁交易;twisting=损客户换单赚佣。 / Churning = excessive trading; twisting = detrimental replacement for commission.
keyfacts: 两者皆不道德 / Both unethical

title: 严重违规 / Severe misconduct
point: 挪用客户资金、伪造文件属严重违规甚至犯罪。 / Misappropriation/forgery is serious misconduct or crime.
keyfacts: 可致撤牌/刑责 / Revocation/criminal liability
